originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&pid_output` is never used.

presenceCondition: (and (= MARLIN_H true) (= PIDTEMP false) (= PID_DEBUG true))
model:
(define-fun PID_DEBUG () Bool
  true)
(define-fun MARLIN_H () Bool
  true)
(define-fun PIDTEMP () Bool
  false)
reasoning: When PIDTEMP=F, #ifdef PIDTEMP block (including nested PID_DEBUG) is skipped entirely. pid_output=1 at L11, pid_output=0 at L19, neither read — dead store. PID_DEBUG=T and MARLIN_H=T are irrelevant when PIDTEMP=F. New bug. Dead store occurs for any PIDTEMP=F config. PC over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
